title: Brazilian Wrap
description: A flavorful and nutritious wrap filled with beans and xeridic, perfect for a quick snack or meal.
instructions: Cook the Brazilian xeridic according to package instructions.
Cook the Monsoon beans according to package instructions.
Warm the large wrap in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
Spoon the cooked xeridic and beans onto the center of the wrap.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrap to form a tight cylinder.
